title: ageratina boekei
intro: Ageratina boekei, also known as Boeke's false dragonhead, is a flowering plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic agent, which helps to reduce pain and alleviate muscle spasms. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Ageratina boekei can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
